features.name: procedural zero-cycle delay with default clocking
features.description: Code should include a ##0 delay statement in a procedural block (initial or always) with a default clocking block defined using default clocking cb @(posedge clk);

features.name: zero-cycle delay in sequence expression
features.description: Code should include a ##0 delay operator used within a sequence declaration

features.name: zero-cycle delay in property expression
features.description: Code should include a ##0 delay operator used within a property declaration

features.name: default clocking block declaration
features.description: Code should include a default clocking block declaration using default clocking cb @(posedge clk);
